{{Quote|As you serve the Empire, trust your sensitivity.|Darth Vader to Reezen|<ref name="The Courtship of Princess Leia" />}}
'''Reezen''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a [[Corporal/Legends|corporal]] within the faction of the former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] that served under [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]].

==Biography==
As a young teenager, Reezen attended a parade with his father on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in which [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] was present. Vader [[Sense Force Potential|felt that the boy had some power in him]], so halted the parade and patted Reezen on the head, telling him to always trust his instincts. Unaware of the significance of this encounter, Reezen never realized he was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]]. He had limited powers of [[Precognition/Legends|divination]] and at times was able to feel where enemies would send their ships.<ref name="The Courtship of Princess Leia" />

He later worked in military intelligence under [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]. It was Reezen, through his powers of reason and subtle use of the Force, that recognized a pattern in the hit-and-run attacks orchestrated by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] designed to draw Zsinj's forces away from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]. Reezen advised Zsinj to reinforce his holdings there.<ref name="The Courtship of Princess Leia" />
